panels.description: Average per-second rate over the last 5 minutes
panels.title: RPS

panels.description: The total number of platform threads currently alive in the JVM.
panels.title: Live Threads

panels.description: Background threads. Do not keep the JVM alive. Ex GC helpers, schedulers, async internals.
panels.title: Daemon Threads

panels.description: The maximum number of live threads ever observed since JVM start. This value never goes down until restart.
panels.title: Peak Threads

panels.description:
Threads by JVM state.

RUNNABLE: Actively executing or ready to run.

BLOCKED: Waiting for a monitor lock.

WAITING: Waiting indefinitely (park, wait).

TIMED_WAITING: Waiting with a timeout.

NEW: Created but not started.

TERMINATED: Finished execution.
panels.title: Thread States

panels.description: % of seconds spent in GC per second. Important: If this spikes, latency impacted
panels.title: GC Pause Time

targets.expr:
100 * 
sum by (ecs_task, version) (
  rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_sum{service_name=~"$service_name", env=~"$env"}[5m])
)
/
sum by (ecs_task, version) (
  rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_count{service_name=~"$service_name", env=~"$env"}[5m])
)
